name: All Pawns Wanted
description_short: All Pawns Wanted is a pawn shop, gun store, and jewelry retailer in Cutler Bay, FL offering fast cash for valuables, firearms sales, and jewelry services.
description_long:
All Pawns Wanted operates as a multi-service retail establishment in Cutler Bay, Miami-Dade County, Florida, combining pawn lending, firearms retail, and jewelry services under one location. The business has been established long enough to maintain a presence on local business directories, though recent reviews suggest operational challenges. The company accepts items of value as collateral for immediate cash loans, with guns and gold jewelry cited as their specialty categories. They maintain inventory of new and used firearms along with ammunition and accessories, plus a selection of jewelry and general merchandise available for purchase. The business also provides jewelry repair and watch battery replacement services, positioning themselves as a one-stop shop for multiple consumer finance and retail needs. According to their description, they serve South Florida residents and visitors seeking quick cash transactions or merchandise browsing.

All Pawns Wanted's core service offering centers on traditional pawn lending—customers can bring valuables and receive immediate cash in exchange for collateral-based loans. They stock both new and used firearms with stated assistance from knowledgeable staff. Their jewelry operations include retail sales of gold and other items, alongside repair and maintenance services. The business advertises flexible acceptance of various items beyond their specialties, suggesting willingness to evaluate most valuable goods. Operating hours extend through Saturday afternoons, providing weekend access typical of pawn retail operations.

The business distinguishes itself primarily through its integrated approach of combining pawn lending, firearms retail, and jewelry services. Their emphasis on guns and gold as specialties reflects a niche market focus within the broader pawn industry. Staff assistance for firearms purchasing and jewelry services differentiate them from single-service pawn shops, though customer experience varies significantly by staff member according to reviews.

Customer reviews reveal significant operational inconsistencies that substantially undermine the business profile. The 2.0 out of 5 star rating across five reviews indicates weak customer satisfaction overall. Reviewers mention a locked front entrance, facility cleanliness issues, and notably negative experiences with at least one staff member whose customer service reportedly drove away customers. One reviewer noted the front being "locked and dirty," while another specifically criticized an employee with grey/white hair for poor attitude and tone. Conversely, one January 2024 review defended the business, attributing the locked front to firearms security requirements and praising interior condition and desk staff. The significant discrepancy between positive and negative reviews suggests inconsistent operations, variable staff performance, or environmental maintenance concerns.
pros: Specialized in guns and gold—dual expertise appeals to collectors and sellers in these categories
Immediate cash availability typical of pawn operations for urgent financial needs
Multi-service location combining pawn lending, firearms retail, and jewelry repair reduces trip consolidation
Weekend hours extending to Saturday 4 PM accommodate working customer schedules
Stated willingness to evaluate items beyond specialties provides flexibility for diverse valuables
Jewelry repair and watch battery replacement services included on-site
New and used firearms inventory with stated knowledgeable staff assistance available
cons: 2.0 out of 5 star rating with customer reviews citing facility cleanliness and locked front entrance concerns
Inconsistent customer service experiences with at least one employee reportedly demonstrating poor attitude and driving away potential sales
Limited review volume (5 reviews) and recent negative feedback from June 2023 and February 2024 suggest declining business quality
Secured front entrance and visual presentation concerns may deter casual browsing compared to competitor pawn shops
Mixed customer testimonials indicate operational inconsistency—one reviewer defended practices while others called it 'worst store in Miami'
best_for: Firearms enthusiasts and buyers seeking new/used gun inventory with staff consultation
Gold and jewelry sellers needing immediate cash for items in the Cutler Bay/South Florida area
Customers with multiple valuables (guns, jewelry, general merchandise) seeking single-location pawn and retail services
Individuals requiring on-site jewelry repair or watch battery replacement alongside pawn lending
diagnosis: All Pawns Wanted is best suited for consumers in South Florida seeking immediate cash through pawn lending or firearms/jewelry retail, but the 2.0-star rating and documented customer service inconsistencies warrant caution. Primary caveat: recent reviews consistently report facility cleanliness, accessibility, and staff attitude issues that substantially impact the customer experience and business reliability.
services: Pawn lending against personal valuables as collateral
Immediate cash transactions for items of perceived value
General merchandise retail from pawned items
Collateral-based loans with flexible item acceptance
